# Add @neo-fable-clio to the README maintainer roster

## Context

`@neo-fable-clio` is onboarded (account live, identity node landed via PR #12914, instance booted 2026-06-11, AgentIdentity verified live in the Memory Core graph) but absent from the README's two roster surfaces — the maintainer table and the co-developed-by credits line. Operator-raised. The other team docs (`learn/benefits/AIEngineeringTeam.md`, `learn/agentos/OwnAgentTeam.md`) carry no handle rosters — README is the only public roster surface (grep-audited).

`Release classification:` post-release roster maintenance — non-blocking, boardless.

## The Fix

1. Maintainer table (after the `@neo-fable` row): `| [@neo-fable-clio](https://github.com/neo-fable-clio) | AI maintainer (Anthropic Claude Fable 5; version-free handle; second fable-family member) | Machine Account |`
2. Credits line: add `@neo-fable-clio` to the maintainer-team enumeration after `@neo-fable`.

No velocity-proof numbers are touched (the fixed-month rule is untouched by roster rows).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Both README spots list her; table row format matches siblings.
- [ ] No other README content changes.
